overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player crosses a neon-lit intersection, proceeds through a covered underpass with graffiti and digital billboards, and emerges into an open plaza dominated by a towering red cylindrical building.

events.description: waiting at crosswalk for vehicles to pass before crossing
beginning to cross the multi-lane intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then proceeding to cross the wide intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall building with horizontal pink neon stripes and large digital billboards
multi-tiered Asian-style building with curved roofs and green accents
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
tall pole with traffic lights and hanging red banners

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at night. The player waits for traffic to clear before crossing the wide street, with a distinctive pink-striped highrise on the left and a traditional temple-style building on the right. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the player begins to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath the elevated highway structure
ambient lighting shifts to red neon glow from nearby signs

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and support beams of the elevated highway
concrete wall covered with pink and blue graffiti tags
metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street
bright red illuminated panels under the building overhang

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, transitioning from the open intersection to a sheltered concrete corridor. The lighting shifts to artificial red neon tones, while graffiti-covered walls and metal guardrails line the path. Other pedestrians walk ahead as the environment becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed underpass tunnel with digital advertisements

events.description: passing large illuminated advertisement screens on the left wall
bright light visible ahead indicating tunnel exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the tunnel passing homeless encampments and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking toward the camera
person in red hooded jacket standing near the railing

entered.detail: illuminated screen displaying KEEP IT SAFE police advertisement and car commercials
large support columns with industrial pipes running along them
vibrant large-scale skull with horns graffiti artwork
tents and tarps set up along the sidewalk railing

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds deeper into the enclosed underpass tunnel, where large digital billboards illuminate the walls with advertisements. The space features industrial concrete pillars, colorful graffiti murals, and makeshift encampments along the railing. The tunnel grows darker except for the bright exit light visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with towering neon buildings

events.description: exiting the tunnel into the open urban plaza
emerging into brighter area with natural sky light mixed with neon signs

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward the plaza with the tall red tower

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: distinctive tall red building with circular windows and industrial design
bright pink neon sign depicting a motorcycle
tall palm trees lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player exits the tunnel into a vast open plaza dominated by a towering red cylindrical building. The environment transitions from enclosed to wide-open, with palm trees lining the street and bright neon signs including a prominent pink motorcycle sign. The sky is visible again as the player crosses toward the busy plaza area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant neon intersection through a claustrophobic industrial underpass and into a sprawling open plaza. It begins at a wide urban crossing at night, moving past a pink-striped highrise and a traditional temple as traffic flows through the intersection. As the camera advances, the open street gives way to a sheltered concrete corridor beneath an elevated highway, where the lighting shifts to artificial red neon tones amidst graffiti-covered walls. The scene then deepens into a dark tunnel illuminated by glowing digital billboards and industrial pillars before the camera tracks toward a bright light at the exit. Finally, the environment expands abruptly into a vast plaza dominated by a towering red cylindrical building, with palm trees and bright neon signs appearing under the open night sky.
